verses:
asādhu⋅saṅge bhāi, kṛṣṇa⋅nāma nāhi haya
nāmākṣara vāhirāya vaṭe, tabu nāma kabhu naya

kabhu nāmābhāsa haya, sadā nāma⋅aparādha
esaba jānibe bhāi kṛṣṇa⋅bhaktira bādha

jadi karibe kṛṣṇa⋅nāma, sādhu⋅saṅga kara
bhukti⋅mukti⋅siddhi⋅vāñchā dūre parihara

‘daśa aparādha’ tyaja, māna⋅apamāna
anāsaktye viṣaya bhuñja, āra laha kṛṣṇa⋅nāma

kṛṣṇa⋅bhaktira anukūla⋅saba karaha svīkāra
kṛṣṇa⋅bhaktira pratikūla saba kara parihāra

jñāna⋅yoga⋅ceṣṭā chāḍa, āra karma⋅saṅga
markaṭa⋅vairāgya tyaja, jāte deharaṅga

‘kṛṣṇa āmāya pāle, rākhe, jāna sarvakāla
ātma⋅nivedana⋅dainye ghucāo jañjāla

sādhu pāoyā kaṣṭa vaḍa jīvera jāniyā
sādhu⋅bhakta⋅rūpe kṛṣṇa āila nadīyā

gorā⋅pada āśraya karaha buddhimān
gorā vai sādhu⋅guru āche kevā āna
en_translation:
O brother! In the company of an unholy person, the Holy Name of Kṛṣṇa does not appear. The syllables of the Name may certainly be uttered, but it is never truly the Holy Name.

Sometimes there is a shadow of the Name, but there is constantly offense to the Name. Brother, know all of this to be an obstacle to devotion to Lord Kṛṣṇa.

If you wish to chant the Holy Name of Kṛṣṇa, then keep the company of the saintly. Cast far away all desires for material enjoyment, liberation, and mystic perfections.

Abandon the ten offenses and all concern for honor or dishonor. Enjoy sense objects without attachment and chant the Holy Name of Kṛṣṇa.

Accept everything that is favorable for devotion to Lord Kṛṣṇa, and reject everything that is unfavorable.

Give up the endeavor for speculative knowledge and mystic yoga, as well as attachment to fruitive work. Abandon "monkey-like" renunciation, which is merely a bodily show.

Always know that Lord Kṛṣṇa maintains and protects you. Remove all your troubles through self-surrender and humility.

Knowing that it is very difficult for the living entity to find a saintly person, Lord Kṛṣṇa came to Nadīyā in the form of a saintly devotee.

O intelligent one! Take shelter of the lotus feet of Lord Gaura. Who else is a saintly Master besides Him?
